home_page.page_description: iPlayground document request entry for confirming the event, registrant name, and email fields. This page is currently a UI preview before the full flow is connected.
home_page.hero_lead: This home page currently focuses on the attendee input UI and keeps the event name, registrant name, and email fields fixed. The database and document generation flow are not connected yet, so submitting the form only shows a client-side message and does not create any records.
home_page.form_subtitle: Fill in the basic information first. This version only implements the interface, so nothing is submitted to the backend or read from the DB.
home_page.event_name_hint: The selector is currently a fixed static list and will later be populated from a data source.
home_page.document_type_hint: Completion certificates are available first. More document types can be opened later based on event and eligibility rules.
home_page.form_feedback_initial: This is currently a static GUI preview. Press the button to show a client-side message so you can confirm the fields and layout.
home_page.footnote: When the DB is connected later, the event list should populate this dropdown first, then send the name and email into a protected portal or lookup flow.
home_page.copyright_notice: All website content and related materials are owned by Taipei Elite Software Developer Association (77212283). Unauthorized reproduction, redistribution, or commercial use is prohibited.
home_page.preview_feedback_template: The current home page field layout is confirmed. Event: {eventName}; document type: {documentType}; registrant name: {attendeeName}; email: {email}. The database, verification flow, and document generation flow are not connected yet.

verify_page.title: iPlayground Certificate Verification
verify_page.status_value: Verification data is not connected yet
